title: Ultralight
body:
**Ultralight** is a high-performance optimization modpack designed to make your Minecraft run smoother and faster. This modpack is perfect for players who want better performance without changing the core gameplay.

## Key Features:

- Performance Boosts: Ultralight includes top optimization mods like Sodium and Lithium to reduce lag and improve frame rates.
- Quality of Life Improvements: Enjoy a better game with mods like Sodium Extras for more settings, and FastQuit for quicker game exits.
- Customizable Settings: The modpack offers many settings, allowing you to adjust the game to your liking, ensuring the best performance for your system.
- Regular Updates: Ultralight is regularly updated to include the latest mod improvements, ensuring you always have the best performance.
